_description: All named rules evaluated for this match — whether they fired, their trigger values, and their effect on estimates

RULE7.definition: When underdog win probability < 15%, do NOT add extra shrinkage to their individual props
RULE7.note: Ecuador at 23% is above the 15% threshold. RULE7 inactive. Ecuador's player/prop estimates were not suppressed under this rule.

RULE8.definition: When draw probability > 25%, blend all comparison props 65% toward model and 35% toward 0.50

Q12_3plus_offsides.rule8_context_applied: Shaded to 0.28 — tight match = fewer forward runs
Q12_3plus_offsides.note: RULE8 provided directional justification for shade, but primary driver was Ecuador's ESPN offside profile

RULE8.not_affected_by_rule8: Q4 (absolute goal total, not comparison), Q9 (FTR market already calibrated for draw), Q11/Q14 (direct card/penalty markets)

RULE5.definition: When player sample size is small (n < 4 starts), apply extra trimming toward 0.25-0.30 floor

Q1_Jimenez.justification: n=2 starts is a thin sample for player goal probability estimation

Q5_Plata.justification: Small sample + card-risk may lead to early substitution

RULE12_outlier_sensitivity.definition: If removing one match from history changes the estimate materially, reduce confidence and trim toward base rate

Q1_Jimenez.check: Jimenez with RSA result: lambda=0.383. Without RSA: lambda≈0.25. Removing one match changes estimate substantially.
Q1_Jimenez.conclusion: Low confidence confirmed. Trim applied (combined with RULE5 above).

FLOOR_0_25.definition: Never submit below 0.25 on any count-stat question
FLOOR_0_25.note: No question breached this floor. Q6 (0.19) and Q7 (0.18) and Q8 (0.08) are player/OTB/OG questions, not count-stat questions — floor does not apply.

RULE14_SOT_goals_cross_check.definition: P(more SOT) >= P(more goals) must hold across all related question pairs
RULE14_SOT_goals_cross_check.check: Q3 (MEX more SOT = 0.53) vs Q4 context (Mexico overwhelmingly expected to outscore). The team-level dominance ordering is consistent.
RULE14_SOT_goals_cross_check.note: Rule satisfied. SOT prop (0.53) consistent with goals hierarchy.

RULE15_underdog_forward_suppression.definition: Scenario A (blowout expected): suppress underdog forward props to 0.20-0.35. Scenario B (underdog chasing): do NOT suppress.
RULE15_underdog_forward_suppression.note: Mexico-Ecuador is a competitive match (34% draw probability). Not a blowout scenario. Plata estimate already at 0.28 from RULE5 — no additional suppression applied.

direct_market_trust.definition: When a liquid Smarkets market exists (both bid+offer), trust the market mid over raw ESPN-derived estimates
applied_to: Q2 (Highest scoring half 2H = 0.40) — direct market, trusted
Q10 (OU8.5 corners Over = 0.40) — trusted over ESPN avg (~0.20-0.25)
Q11 (OU3.5 cards Over = 0.54) — direct market, trusted
Q13 (goal before break = 0.40) — model+bracket cross-check, trusted
Q14 (penalty Yes = 0.26) — direct market, trusted (wide spread noted)

market_override_case.Q10_corners: Our ESPN model predicted ~6.2 combined expected corners (MEX avg 1.67 + ECU competitive avg 4.5). Market said 40% for 9+. We submitted 0.40 per market. POST-MATCH: 9+ corners DID occur — market was right, ESPN-only estimate would have been wrong.
